name: Luis Lara
summary: Luis Lara is a quick-twitch, switch-hitting outfielder known for his elite defense in center field and refined bat-to-ball skills. He possesses plus-plus speed and has demonstrated excellent reads off the bat with great range. While he makes consistent contact and uses a small strike zone to his advantage, his power development remains a key area for growth, though his exit velocities have shown improvement. Lara was with Double-A Biloxi in 2025 and has since been assigned to Triple-A Nashville in March 2026.

recentNews.title: Brewers Luis Lara Hits His Second Home Run Of 2026
recentNews.summary: Luis Lara hit his second home run of 2026 in just five Triple-A games, showcasing improved power to complement his strong defense and bat-to-ball skills.

recentNews.title: Brewers' Outfielder Luis Lara Off to Hot Start in Triple-A Nashville for 2026 Season
recentNews.summary: Luis Lara, Milwaukee's No. 12-ranked prospect, has started the 2026 season in Triple-A with the Nashville Sounds, posting a .750 slugging percentage through his first 22 plate appearances after leading the Southern League in 2025 with 32 doubles for the Double-A Biloxi Shuckers.

recentNews.title: Brewers' top outfield prospect silences doubters with early 2026 power surge
recentNews.summary: Luis Lara is off to a hot start in Triple-A Nashville in 2026, posting a .750 slugging percentage through his first 22 plate appearances, following a strong 2025 season in Double-A and a prominent role in Cactus League games.
